Exception Reason: N/A","arguments":[]},"analysisTarget":{"uri":"cfn_test/insecure-s3.yaml","index":-1},"locations":[{"id":1,"physicalLocation":{"artifactLocation":{"uri":"cfn_test/insecure-s3.yaml","index":-1},"region":{"startLine":11,"startColumn":2,"endLine":11,"endColumn":17,"charOffset":-1,"byteOffset":-1,"snippet":{"text":"Resources:
  BadBucketPolicy:
    Properties:
      Bucket:
        Ref: BadBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Action: s3:*
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Resource:
              - Fn::GetAtt:
                  - BadBucket
                  - Arn
              - Fn::Sub: ${BadBucket.Arn}/*
        Version: '2012-10-17'
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
"}}},"logicalLocations":[],"annotations":[],"relationships":[]}],"stacks":[],"codeFlows":[],"graphs":[],"graphTraversals":[],"relatedLocations":[],"rank":-1.0,"attachments":[],"fixes":[],"taxa":[],"properties":{"tags":["aws","cdk","cdk-nag","AwsSolutions","AwsSolutions-S10","BadBucketPolicy","AWS::S3::BucketPolicy","tool_name::cdk-nag","tool_type::IAC"],"cdk_nag_finding":{"rule_id":"AwsSolutions-S10","resource_id":"ASHCDKNagScanner/cfn_test--insecure-s3.yaml/BadBucketPolicy","compliance":"Non-Compliant","exception_reason":"N/A","rule_level":"Error","rule_info":"The S3 Bucket or bucket policy does not require requests to use SSL."},"cfn_resource":{"Resources":{"BadBucketPolicy":{"Type":"AWS::S3::BucketPolicy","Properties":{"Bucket":{"Ref":"BadBucket"},"PolicyDocument":{"Version":"2012-10-17","Statement":[{"Effect":"Allow","Principal":"*","Action":"s3:*","Resource":[{"Fn::GetAtt":["BadBucket","Arn"]},{"Fn::Sub":"${BadBucket.Arn}/*"}]}]}}}}},"scanner_name":"cdk-nag","scanner_version":"3.5.4","scanner_details":{"tool_name":"cdk-nag","tool_version":"3.5.4","tool_invocation":{"start_time":"2026-07-09T16:46:52.126015+00:00","end_time":"2026-07-09T16:47:12.679661+00:00"}}}}
